missing_requirements.evidence_quote: The ultimate aim of this system is to help such children by giving the collected devices from the people who were willing to help them.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall provide access to donated devices for underprivileged children.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: This system requests the donors to enter the details regarding the device they are willing to donate.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall collect device donation information from donors.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall allow volunteers to join the team so that they could be helped by picking up the devices in their locality (Figures 18.1–18.12).
hallucinations.reason: This requirement is not supported by the source text, as it only mentions allowing volunteers to join the team without specifying any benefits or assistance.

duplicates.requirement_a: The system shall request donors to enter device details.
duplicates.requirement_b: The system shall collect device donation information from donors.
duplicates.reason: These two requirements are similar and can be combined into a single requirement.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall verify device details by the admin.
ambiguities.reason: This requirement is ambiguous, as it does not specify what exactly needs to be verified (e.g., device condition, donor information).

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall assign collected devices to a pickup executive.
ambiguities.reason: This requirement is ambiguous, as it does not specify how the assignment process will work or who will be responsible for picking up the devices.
